evals.name: rest-route-map
evals.prompt: Document the REST API routes for positions: list, create, retrieve, update, delete.
evals.expected_output: Markdown table with method, path, auth requirement, request body, and response shape for all 5 CRUD routes.

evals.name: request-response-contract
evals.prompt: Define the request/response contract for POST /auth/login.
evals.expected_output: Typed contract showing request body (email, password), success response (access_token, token_type), and error responses (401, 422).

evals.name: pagination-pattern
evals.prompt: Define a reusable pagination pattern for all list endpoints in the API.
evals.expected_output: Standard query params (page, limit), response envelope with data array, total, page, and limit fields, and example for GET /positions.

evals.name: error-response-standard
evals.prompt: Define a standard error response format for the REST API.
evals.expected_output: JSON error envelope with status, code, message, and optional detail field, with examples for 400, 401, 403, 404, and 500.
